name: Shery.js — WebGL Image Distortion Effects
description: One-call WebGL liquid/wave/perlin distortion effects on images. Powered by Three.js. Add class shery-img to target images.
body:
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/three.js/0.155.0/three.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.7/dist/gsap.min.js"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/aayushchouhan24/sheryjs@main/dist/Shery.css" />
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/aayushchouhan24/sheryjs@main/dist/Shery.js"></script>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    if (!window.Shery) return;
    var imgs = document.querySelectorAll('.shery-img, [data-shery]');
    if (!imgs.length) return;
    try {
      Shery.imageEffect('.shery-img, [data-shery]', {
        style: parseInt(document.querySelector('[data-shery]')?.getAttribute('data-shery') || '2'),
        config: { uFrequency: { value: 4 }, uAmplitude: { value: 20 } },
        slideStyle: false
      });
    } catch(e) {}
  });
</script>
